overall.description: First-person cockpit view from a futuristic flying vehicle in Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through dense urban canyons, transitioning through a building passage to open suburban landscapes with luxury villas, then returning via industrial zones to the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense cyberpunk urban canyon with elevated highways

agents.ego_description: piloting a flying vehicle through narrow gaps between skyscrapers at high speed, maintaining steady altitude

entered.detail: futuristic transparent canopy framing the view with red and white interior accents
digital display showing speed and navigation data in the center console
tall futuristic building with glass facade and neon accents
tall futuristic building with vertical neon lighting and advertisements
large digital advertising screens attached to building facades
multi-level highway structure running parallel to the flight path

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view from a futuristic flying vehicle cockpit, navigating through a dense cyberpunk urban canyon. Tall glass skyscrapers flank both sides with neon billboards and elevated highways visible, while the vehicle maintains a steady forward flight between the buildings.

events.description: entering narrow building passage between skyscrapers
exiting dark passage into bright open landscape with mountain views

agents.ego_description: navigating through a tight structural passage between buildings, adjusting speed for the narrow corridor

entered.detail: dark concrete and metal walls of the narrow building gap
horizontal support beams crossing the passage overhead
distant brown mountain range visible through the passage exit

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a narrow passage between buildings, with structural walls and beams enclosing the view. The lighting shifts to mixed as the vehicle moves through the shadowed corridor, then brightens dramatically as it emerges to reveal a distant mountain range and open landscape ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open suburban landscape with winding roads and scattered palm trees

events.description: transitioning from urban canyon to open suburban landscape with mountain backdrop

agents.ego_description: flying over suburban terrain with gentle banking turns, maintaining altitude above the residential hills

entered.detail: winding asphalt roads cutting through the hilly residential terrain
clusters of palm trees dotting the suburban landscape
grass-covered hills with low-rise residential buildings

segments.scene_description: Emerging into wide open space, the vehicle flies over a sprawling suburban landscape with winding roads cutting through grassy hills. The mountain range dominates the background while scattered palm trees and low-rise residential buildings populate the terrain below under bright natural sunlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: luxury residential district with modern villas and swimming pools

events.description: descending flight path to lower altitude over luxury residential area

agents.ego_description: descending and slowing down while flying over luxury villas, observing the modern architecture below

entered.detail: flat rooftops of contemporary luxury homes with geometric architecture
rectangular and curved swimming pools visible in villa courtyards
winding private roads connecting the hillside villas

segments.scene_description: The vehicle descends over a luxury residential district featuring modern villas with flat rooftops and swimming pools. The flight path slows and lowers to provide a closer view of the high-end architecture and curved private roadways winding through the manicured hillside properties.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial zone with power plant transitioning to dense urban core

events.description: approaching industrial zone with smoke stacks and electrical infrastructure
re-entering dense urban canyon with towering skyscrapers

agents.ego_description: banking sharply around industrial structures and accelerating back toward the dense city center, navigating between towering buildings

entered.detail: tall industrial smoke stacks emitting white vapor
high-voltage electrical transmission towers and cables
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings marking the city center return

segments.scene_description: The vehicle banks around an industrial area featuring smoke stacks and power lines, then transitions back into the dense urban core. The final approach brings the vehicle between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers, completing the circuit from urban canyon to open landscape and back to the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person flight from a claustrophobic cyberpunk urban canyon into a vast, sun-drenched suburban landscape. It begins by navigating between towering glass skyscrapers flanked by neon billboards and elevated highways. As the vehicle enters a narrow passage, the view becomes enclosed by structural walls and beams, with the lighting shifting into deep shadow before brightening dramatically upon exit. The scene then opens wide to reveal a distant mountain range and an expansive terrain of grassy hills and winding roads. Finally, the camera glides over a sprawling residential area populated by palm trees and low-rise villas under bright, natural sunlight.

The shot follows a continuous flight path that descends over a luxury residential district before banking back into the dense urban core. It begins by gliding over modern villas with flat rooftops and swimming pools, slowing its pace to drift closer to the high-end architecture and curved private roadways winding through manicured hillsides. As the vehicle pulls away from the residential greenery, the scenery shifts toward an industrial zone characterized by towering smoke stacks and power lines. The camera then banks sharply, transitioning from the open industrial outskirts back into the claustrophobic scale of the city center. Finally, the flight path narrows as the vehicle weaves between towering cyberpunk skyscrapers to complete its circuit.
